name: clara-jonas-clara-tobias-handoff
description: Cross-specialist handoff check for Clara routing to Jonas, returning to Clara, and then routing to Tobias without persona leakage.

userTurns.label: Jonas scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, qualify a plumbing company with six vans that needs faster lead triage and wants to launch within a month.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Tobias scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this field note into a quote draft: leaking flat roof over 120 square meters, damaged insulation near the skylight, access by lift only.
